name: forgeflow
description: A guided flow from product idea to reviewed code.

interface.shortDescription: Choose the right path from idea to review.
interface.longDescription: Forgeflow routes work to product brainstorming, focused planning, or large-scale wayfinding, then carries a clear change through specification, tickets, implementation, and review.
defaultPrompt: Help me decide what to build for a new project.
Help me decide whether this needs Wayfinder.
Turn this idea into reviewed code.
